raw.subject: Your Killeen page caught my eye, Mikes Mobile Auto Repair
raw.body:
Hi,

I was impressed by your commitment to serving the Killeen community, especially in a city like yours with such a strong sense of history. I loved seeing that you've partnered with Uncle Bacon's BBQ - it's great to see local businesses supporting one another!

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and with many customers preferring to book services online, it might be worth considering. It could help you reach a wider audience and reduce the number of missed calls.

I took a moment to sketch out a simple homepage idea using some of the photos and posts you've shared on Facebook. It includes a prominent emergency call-to-action, a list of your services, a map of your service area, and a sticky phone bar for easy contact.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/mikes-mobile-auto-repair-killeen

It would be a straightforward project to build out, and local businesses like yours often find it's worth the investment. If you'd like to discuss further, feel free to reply or give me a quick call to get started.
